title: Servlet API Request-Response Cycle
description: A visual representation of the key components in the Servlet API and their interactions during a single HTTP request-response cycle.
relationships: Client sends an HTTP Request to the Web Server
Web Server forwards the request to the Servlet Container
Servlet Container uses the Deployment Descriptor (web.xml) to map the request URL to a specific HttpServlet
Container creates Request and Response objects
Container calls the servlet's service() method, which routes to doGet() or doPost()
Servlet uses Request object to read client data
Servlet uses Response object to write output (HTML, JSON, etc.)
Response is sent back through the Container and Web Server to the Client
